answer:
<think> I know that Operation Michael was a major German military operation during World War I, launched on March 21, 1918. It was a massive assault on the British Expeditionary Force (BEF) and the French Sixth Army on the Western Front. I also recall that the Quartermaster General of the British Army during this period was Sir William Robertson. He was a key figure in the British military leadership and played a significant role in the planning and execution of various operations, including Operation Michael. Therefore, it is likely that Sir William Robertson was the Quartermaster General involved in Operation Michael.</think>
<answer> Sir William Robertson </answer>
